research_summary.city_summary: Dense, walkable city with strong museum, food, and landmark coverage across central neighborhoods.
research_summary.seasonal_context: Cool or cold season context. Shorter daylight and heavier outerwear may matter.
transport_notes: Use the Metro for most cross-city movements.
Cluster activities by arrondissement to reduce transit time.
budget_notes: Use one paid anchor attraction per day to keep spending predictable.
Cluster meals and major attractions by neighborhood to reduce transport waste.
Budget appears tight for a comfort-first trip, so prioritize free landmarks and casual dining.

places.name: Eiffel Tower
places.general_description: Iconic Paris landmark with the best ambience in late afternoon into evening.

places.name: Louvre Museum
places.general_description: Large museum best approached with a focused route rather than a full-day attempt.

places.name: Le Marais
places.general_description: Walkable historic district with boutiques, cafes, and good casual food options.

recommended_apps.reason: Reliable route planning for Metro and buses.

recommended_apps.name: TheFork
recommended_apps.reason: Useful for restaurant discovery and reservations.

recommended_apps.name: GetYourGuide
recommended_apps.reason: Good for timed-entry bookings and tours.

warnings: Opening hours and event listings are not yet connected to live providers.
Weather is seasonal guidance, not a live forecast.

media_scenes.title: Morning at Eiffel Tower
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic premium travel scene in Paris featuring Eiffel Tower in 7th arrondissement during the 09:00 to 11:30 part of the itinerary. Reflect a balanced trip style, cool or cold season context. shorter daylight and heavier outerwear may matter. Show realistic crowd density, subtle local atmosphere, and activities connected to food, culture, photography.
style_rules: Photorealistic travel photography with cinematic composition.
Keep landmarks geographically plausible and avoid fantasy elements.
Show season, weather, time of day, and crowd level consistent with the itinerary context.
Use natural lighting and a premium editorial travel aesthetic.
Do not include text overlays, logos, watermarks, or collage layouts.
